title: Startup Landing Page
description: Designed a responsive landing page for a tech startup to increase conversions.
challenge: Startup needed a high-converting landing page quickly.
solution: Created a modern responsive design with optimized CTAs.

title: E-commerce Store Redesign
description: Revamped an existing e-commerce store for a fashion brand.
challenge: Old design was not mobile-friendly and conversions were low.
solution: Redesigned UI/UX, integrated payment gateway, and improved navigation.

title: Web App for Task Management
description: Developed a custom task management web application for small teams.
challenge: Client needed a collaborative web app for remote teams.
solution: Built real-time task tracking and notification system.

title: Restaurant Website with Online Ordering
description: Created a modern website with integrated online ordering system for a local restaurant.
challenge: Restaurant needed online presence and ordering during pandemic restrictions.
solution: Built responsive website with menu display, online ordering, and table reservations.
results: Online orders increased by 150%, overall revenue up 35%

title: Non-Profit Organization Website
description: Developed a donation-focused website for an environmental non-profit organization.
challenge: Non-profit lacked professional online presence to attract donors and volunteers.
solution: Created compelling website with donation forms, volunteer signup, and impact stories.
results: Donations increased by 200%, volunteer applications up 300%

title: Real Estate Agent Portfolio
description: Built a professional portfolio website for a real estate agent to showcase properties.
challenge: Real estate agent needed modern platform to showcase luxury properties effectively.
solution: Developed property listing website with advanced search, virtual tours, and lead capture.
results: Client showings increased by 80%, property sales up 45%

title: Fitness Studio Management System
description: Created a web application for managing gym memberships, classes, and scheduling.
challenge: Fitness studio needed digital solution for member management and class bookings.
solution: Built comprehensive management system with member portal and admin dashboard.
results: Member retention increased by 40%, class bookings up 60%

title: Educational Platform Redesign
description: Redesigned an online learning platform for better user experience and engagement.
challenge: Existing platform had poor UX and low completion rates.
solution: Complete redesign with improved navigation, gamification, and mobile learning.
results: Course completion rates increased by 55%, user engagement up 70%
